securitization_entities: Taco Bell Franchisor Holdings, LLC (Franchisor Holdco)
Taco Bell Franchise Holder 1, LLC (Franchise Holder)
Taco Bell IP Holder, LLC (IP Holder)
item21_financial_structure_detail.cash_flow_mechanics: All cash collections deposited into Issuer account → transferred to trustee cash accounts → used for note interest/principal payments → excess remitted to TBC
item21_financial_structure_detail.non_cash_distributions: Franchise fees/royalties collected by Manager (TBC) on behalf of Company, deposited to Issuer account. Recorded as non-cash distributions since cash never received by Company.
item21_financial_structure_detail.management_agreement: A&R Management Agreement (Aug 19, 2021). TBC performs all services. Management fee paid by Issuer, not Company. No expenses allocated to Company.
item21_financial_structure_detail.minimum_net_worth_requirement: $15M (for large franchisor exemption under state franchise registration laws)
item21_financial_structure_detail.franchise_holder_relationship: Franchise Holder holds legacy pre-2016 franchise agreements. As agreements transfer/successor, they move to the Company. Company had 6,207 units in 2024 vs 5,738 in 2022.

balance_sheet.asset_composition: 100% financial assets (restricted cash, receivables, franchise incentives, intercompany). Zero property, plant, equipment.
balance_sheet.liability_composition: Primarily deferred franchise fees ($78.5M) and accrued franchise incentives ($8.1M). Zero debt at Company level (debt is at Issuer level).

cash_flow.note: Operating cash flow equals interest income. All franchise cash flows are non-cash distributions to member.

royalty.alcohol_restriction_workaround: If state/local law restricts collection from alcohol sales, non-alcohol royalty rate increases to compensate
royalty.modification_right: Franchisor may modify rate for atypical locations or unusual circumstances
